text: Intuitive, web-based clinical student services management for Ontario school boards
Part of the IEP Online Suite, Clinical Services is a comprehensive, web-based
solution designed to help school boards and clinical student service teams
manage clinical individualized education plan (IEP) information for students more
efficiently—from referral to consent to service tracking. It is part of the suite, but
adoption of IEP Online is not required to use it.
Clinical Services was developed specifically for Ontario schools by Public management
Consulting Group (PCG). With it, boards can accurately track paperwork, service
provision, and outcomes for all students receiving services (i.e., speech, social work,
vision, hearing, and many others). PCG is the largest provider of IEP solutions in board’s existing student

of specialized services to students, creating detailed, student-specific electronic

documentation to individual student records, whether scanned or photographed
(from an electronic tablet or other mobile device).
